stemHtml: In addition to informing each State, whose citizens are known to be on board an aircraft, the State of the country in which an aircraft has landed after an act of unlawful interference must immediately notify the…

options.a: State of Registry of the aircraft and the State of the operator only.
options.b: State of the operator, the EASA and ICAO.
options.c: State of Registry of the aircraft and the EASA.
options.d: State of Registry of the aircraft, the State of the operator and ICAO.
